schedule.title: Today Schedule
schedule.recommendation: Suggested schedule: handle high-intent or near-closing customers in the morning, follow up medium-priority customers in the afternoon, and place low-priority customers in open time slots.
schedule.recommendation_high_priority: Suggested schedule: handle high-intent or near-closing customers in the morning, follow up medium-priority customers in the afternoon, and place low-priority customers in open time slots.
schedule.recommendation_no_high_priority: No high-priority meetings are scheduled today. Follow up medium-priority customers first, then use open time for low-priority customers.
schedule.today_followup_note: Today follow-up is automatically determined by whether the customer's next meeting date equals today.
schedule.recommendation_no_customers: No customer meetings are scheduled for today. Proactively follow up Warm or Hot customers.
training.title: AI Training Agent
training.summary_template: Today includes {total_outreach} customer outreach touches: {calls} calls, {whatsapp} WhatsApp messages, {appointments} appointments, {meetings} meetings, and {closings} closings.
training.summary_missing_log: Daily activity details are not available for this review.
training.advice.high: Performance is strong. Keep the current rhythm and prioritize high-intent customers.
training.advice.medium: Overall performance is stable. Increase appointment scheduling and improve conversion from outreach to meetings.
training.advice.low: Today's conversion is low. Review opening scripts, follow-up frequency, and customer segmentation, with individual coaching from the manager.
training.advice.medium_no_meetings: Overall performance is stable. Increase appointment scheduling and improve conversion from outreach to meetings.
training.advice.medium_no_closings: Overall performance is stable. Increase appointment scheduling and improve conversion from outreach to meetings.
training.advice_fallback.High: Today's conversion is low. Review opening scripts, follow-up frequency, and customer segmentation, with individual coaching from the manager.
training.advice_fallback.Medium: Overall performance is stable. Increase appointment scheduling and improve conversion from outreach to meetings.
training.advice_fallback.Low: Performance is strong. Keep the current rhythm and prioritize high-intent customers.
training.manager_feedback: Managers should monitor this agent's follow-up rhythm and arrange one-on-one coaching when needed.
training.hidden_score_agent_info: Hidden Closing Score is not shown for Agent role.
scoring_basis.title: AI Scoring Basis
scoring_basis.item_1: Outreach volume: phone and WhatsApp volume reflects proactive prospecting.
scoring_basis.item_2: Appointment rate: ability to convert customer outreach into appointments.
scoring_basis.item_3: Meeting rate: ability to convert appointments into real meetings.
scoring_basis.item_4: Closings: signed deals or successful cases.
scoring_basis.item_5: Follow-up quality: notes, customer stage, and next actions.
scoring_basis.item_6: Risk alerts: repeated days with no appointments, no meetings, or low conversion are flagged as higher risk.
scoring_basis.note: AI scoring is for management and training reference only. Final judgment remains with the manager.
dashboard.agent_blocked: Manager Dashboard is available to Manager and Admin only.
dashboard.title: Manager Dashboard
dashboard.hidden_score_rationale: Score combines outreach volume, appointment count, meeting count, and closings. It is for internal manager coaching and follow-up reference only.
column.name: Name
hidden_score.rationale: Score combines outreach volume, appointment count, meeting count, and closings. It is for internal manager coaching and follow-up reference only.
demo.dataset_description: Load a realistic demo dataset for a 20-agent insurance team. This only affects demo records in the demo tenant.
demo.confirm_reset: I understand this will reset demo records only.
demo.seed_success: Demo data loaded: {agents} agents, {customers} customers, {logs} daily logs.
demo.not_allowed: Demo data reset is available only for the demo tenant or cloud demo mode.
training.today_recommendation: Today recommendation: {outreach} outreach touches and {meetings} meetings recorded. Prioritize high-potential customers and confirm next actions before the end of day.
training.today_recommendation_empty: No activity has been recorded today. Follow up Warm or Hot customers and confirm the next meeting date.
training.agent_activity_reminder: Agent activity reminder: latest risk level is {risk}. Keep notes updated and confirm the next action for each active customer.
training.manager_team_recommendation: Manager team recommendation: {low_active} low-activity agents and {risk_agents} risk agents need coaching attention.
demo.reset_success: Demo data reset and reloaded: {agents} agents, {customers} customers, {logs} daily logs.
stage_guidance.Cold: New or lightly qualified customer. Use low-pressure WhatsApp care and a short discovery call.
stage_guidance.Warm: Interested customer. Confirm protection needs, budget, and the next appointment.
stage_guidance.Hot: High-intent customer. Follow up within three days and keep the closing conversation active.
stage_guidance.Proposal: Proposal is already in progress. Prepare comparison points and objection handling.
stage_guidance.Closed: Closed case. Keep policy service, premium reminders, and referral follow-up active.
stage_guidance.Lost: Lost or paused case. Keep light-touch care and revisit after thirty days.
followup.recommendation_hot: Urgent follow-up: contact within 3 days, confirm decision criteria, and book a closing conversation.
followup.recommendation_proposal: Proposal follow-up: prepare objection handling, compare benefits clearly, and confirm the decision date.
followup.recommendation_warm: Needs analysis follow-up: confirm protection gap, budget, and next meeting time.
followup.recommendation_cold: Light-touch follow-up: send useful insurance education and qualify need without pressure.
followup.recommendation_closed: Service follow-up: confirm policy delivery, payment reminders, and referral opportunity.
followup.recommendation_lost: Nurture follow-up: keep a 30-day care rhythm and avoid heavy sales pressure.
coaching.title: Coaching Plan
coaching.issue.closing_conversion: Appointments are not converting to closings
coaching.issue.activity_gap: Low activity and weak pipeline creation
coaching.root_cause.appointment_conversi: Opening scripts may not create enough need or urgency.
coaching.root_cause.closing_conversion: Proposal value and objection handling need sharpening.
coaching.root_cause.activity_gap: Daily prospecting blocks and follow-up cadence are not yet stable.
coaching.root_cause.balanced_pipeline: Current activity is balanced; keep monitoring quality and conversion.
coaching.training_focus.appointment_conv: Practice needs-discovery questions and appointment-setting transitions.
coaching.training_focus.closing_conversi: Practice proposal explanation, objection handling, and decision-date confirmation.
coaching.training_focus.activity_gap: Rebuild daily call blocks, WhatsApp follow-up rhythm, and prospect list hygiene.
coaching.training_focus.balanced_pipelin: Maintain current cadence and review high-potential cases first.
coaching.next_action.appointment_convers: Review 5 calls and role-play converting interest into appointments.
coaching.next_action.closing_conversion: Review 3 proposal cases and prepare next-step closing scripts.
coaching.next_action.activity_gap: Set a same-day outreach target and check progress before end of day.
coaching.next_action.balanced_pipeline: Keep weekly coaching focused on top opportunities and referrals.
coaching.manager_note.appointment_conver: Coach call structure before increasing lead volume.
coaching.manager_note.closing_conversion: Coach value framing and objection handling before the next proposal meeting.
coaching.manager_note.activity_gap: Coach daily discipline first; pipeline volume is the immediate constraint.
coaching.manager_note.balanced_pipeline: Use light coaching and keep attention on high-value customers.
opportunity.reason.proposal: This customer is already in proposal stage and is close to a decision point.
opportunity.reason.hot: This customer has strong intent and should be kept in active closing rhythm.
opportunity.reason.warm: This customer has shown interest and needs a clearer needs-analysis conversation.
opportunity.reason.cold: This customer is still lightly qualified and needs low-pressure nurturing.
opportunity.reason.closed: This customer has already closed and is best handled through service and referrals.
opportunity.reason.lost: This customer is paused or lost and should be nurtured lightly.
opportunity.action.proposal: Confirm protection gap, compare options, and handle objections before the next meeting.
opportunity.action.hot: Call today or within 24 hours to confirm decision criteria and next meeting.
opportunity.action.warm: Book a needs-analysis meeting and confirm budget, family situation, and timing.
opportunity.action.cold: Send useful education content and qualify interest with a short question.
opportunity.action.closed: Confirm policy service, premium reminders, and referral opportunity.
opportunity.action.lost: Keep a 30-day care rhythm and avoid heavy sales pressure.
opportunity.message.proposal: Hi, I prepared the protection comparison for you. May I confirm which benefit matters most before our next meeting?
opportunity.message.hot: Hi, based on your current needs, I suggest we confirm the protection gap today and reserve the next step.
opportunity.message.warm: Hi, would it be useful to spend 10 minutes mapping your medical and savings protection needs?
opportunity.message.cold: Hi, I am sharing a short insurance checklist that many families find useful. Which area is most relevant to you?
opportunity.message.closed: Hi, I would like to confirm your policy service details and remind you of the next payment date.
opportunity.message.lost: Hi, just checking in. If your protection needs change later, I can help compare options again.
sales.strength.closing: Able to convert meetings into closings.
sales.strength.meetings: Able to turn appointments into real meetings.
sales.strength.appointments: Able to convert outreach into appointments.
sales.strength.outreach: Strong outreach volume and prospecting discipline.
sales.weakness.activity_gap: Activity volume is too low to create a healthy pipeline.
sales.weakness.appointment_conversion: Calls and WhatsApp contacts are not converting into enough appointments.
sales.weakness.meeting_conversion: Appointments are not becoming enough real meetings.
sales.weakness.closing_conversion: Meetings are not converting into enough closings.
sales.explanation.activity_gap: The main risk is insufficient daily discipline and too few new opportunities.
sales.explanation.appointment_conversion: The main bottleneck is opening script, need creation, or invitation technique.
sales.explanation.meeting_conversion: The main bottleneck is confirmation flow or customer qualification quality.
sales.explanation.closing_conversion: The main bottleneck is needs analysis, proposal framing, or objection handling.
sales.explanation.balanced_pipeline: The activity funnel is relatively balanced; focus on high-value cases.
coaching.reason.activity_gap: Recent outreach volume is below the level needed for consistent opportunities.
coaching.reason.appointment_conversion: Outreach is active, but appointment rate is below expectation.
coaching.reason.meeting_conversion: Appointments are booked, but meeting attendance or customer quality is weak.
coaching.reason.closing_conversion: Meetings are happening, but the proposal is not converting into signed cases.
coaching.reason.balanced_pipeline: The funnel is balanced and should be maintained with light coaching.
coaching.focus.activity_gap: Daily call block, WhatsApp rhythm, and prospect list hygiene.
coaching.focus.appointment_conversion: Invitation scripts, needs discovery, and rejection handling.
coaching.focus.meeting_conversion: Confirmation process, pre-meeting reminders, and customer qualification.
coaching.focus.closing_conversion: Needs analysis, proposal framing, and objection handling.
coaching.focus.balanced_pipeline: High-potential case review and referral development.
coaching.agent_next_action.activity_gap: Complete a daily outreach target and report progress before end of day.
coaching.agent_next_action.appointment_c: Make at least 3 effective appointment invitations per day for the next 7 days.
coaching.agent_next_action.meeting_conve: Confirm every appointment one day before and again on the meeting day.
coaching.agent_next_action.closing_conve: Prepare next-step closing scripts for the next 3 proposal cases.
coaching.agent_next_action.balanced_pipe: Keep current cadence and focus on top opportunities.
coaching.manager_action.activity_gap: Manager checks daily activity rhythm and helps rebuild the prospecting block.
coaching.manager_action.appointment_conv: Manager arranges 2 call reviews and 1 role play this week.
coaching.manager_action.meeting_conversi: Manager reviews appointment confirmation scripts and no-show reasons.
coaching.manager_action.closing_conversi: Manager reviews proposal cases and rehearses objection handling.
coaching.manager_action.balanced_pipelin: Manager keeps light weekly coaching and monitors quality.
coaching.target_metric.activity_gap: Reach at least 20 outreach touches per day.
coaching.target_metric.closing_conversio: Raise closing rate from meetings to 20%.
coaching.target_metric.balanced_pipeline: Maintain current conversion while increasing high-potential follow-up.
manager_insight.title: AI Manager Insight
manager_insight.summary: This week the main team bottleneck is {problem}. {affected_agents} of {total_agents} agents are affected.
manager_insight.recommendation.activity_: Focus this week on daily call blocks and prospect list discipline.
manager_insight.recommendation.appointme: Focus this week on invitation scripts and needs-led appointment setting.
manager_insight.recommendation.meeting_c: Focus this week on confirmation flow and customer qualification.
manager_insight.recommendation.closing_c: Focus this week on proposal framing and objection handling.
manager_insight.recommendation.balanced_: Maintain rhythm and spend coaching time on high-potential cases.
manager_insight.next_action.activity_gap: Set daily outreach targets and review progress before end of day.
manager_insight.next_action.appointment_: Run call review and role play for agents with low appointment rate.
manager_insight.next_action.meeting_conv: Audit no-shows and standardize appointment confirmation scripts.
manager_insight.next_action.closing_conv: Review proposal cases and prepare objection-handling playbooks.
manager_insight.next_action.balanced_pip: Review Top 10 opportunities and protect follow-up discipline.
opportunity.score_reason: Score is calculated from customer status, meeting timing, note signals, follow-up history, and the agent's recent activity.
coaching.why.activity_gap: This coaching is selected because activity volume is below the minimum needed to create enough new opportunities.
coaching.why.appointment_conversion: This coaching is selected because outreach exists, but appointment conversion is materially weak.
coaching.why.meeting_conversion: This coaching is selected because appointments are not becoming enough real customer meetings.
coaching.why.closing_conversion: This coaching is selected because meetings are not becoming enough signed cases.
coaching.why.balanced_pipeline: This coaching is light-touch because the funnel is balanced.
coaching.expected_improvement.activity_g: Expected improvement: rebuild consistent daily pipeline activity within 7 days.
coaching.expected_improvement.appointmen: Expected improvement: raise appointment conversion and create more qualified meetings within 7 days.
coaching.expected_improvement.meeting_co: Expected improvement: reduce no-shows and improve meeting attendance within 7 days.
coaching.expected_improvement.closing_co: Expected improvement: improve proposal-to-closing discipline within 7 days.
coaching.expected_improvement.balanced_p: Expected improvement: maintain current funnel health and increase high-value follow-up.
manager_insight.reason.activity_gap: Most agents show insufficient outreach, so the team bottleneck is pipeline creation.
manager_insight.reason.appointment_conve: Multiple agents have activity but below-average appointment conversion.
manager_insight.reason.meeting_conversio: The team is booking appointments but losing too many before real meetings.
manager_insight.reason.closing_conversio: The team has meetings but insufficient conversion into signed cases.
manager_insight.reason.balanced_pipeline: No single severe bottleneck dominates; protect cadence and focus on top opportunities.
